context: Tests whether the agent applies prevent_destroy = true on critical resources (KMS key, RDS, S3 bucket), includes the abort_incomplete_multipart_upload rule in the S3 lifecycle configuration, and enables encryption on the RDS instance.

checklist.name: KMS key prevent_destroy
checklist.description: The aws_kms_key resource has lifecycle { prevent_destroy = true }

checklist.name: RDS instance prevent_destroy
checklist.description: The aws_db_instance resource has lifecycle { prevent_destroy = true }

checklist.name: S3 bucket prevent_destroy
checklist.description: The aws_s3_bucket resource has lifecycle { prevent_destroy = true }

checklist.name: abort_incomplete_multipart_upload rule
checklist.description: The S3 lifecycle configuration includes a rule with abort_incomplete_multipart_upload { days_after_initiation = 7 }

checklist.name: RDS storage_encrypted
checklist.description: The aws_db_instance resource has storage_encrypted = true

checklist.name: S3 encryption configured
checklist.description: The S3 bucket has server-side encryption configured (aws_s3_bucket_server_side_encryption_configuration or equivalent)

checklist.name: File organization correct
checklist.description: Generated files include at minimum: main.tf, variables.tf, outputs.tf, versions.tf

checklist.name: Usage instructions included
checklist.description: Response includes next steps for terraform init, plan, apply and security reminders

checklist.name: No sensitive values hardcoded
checklist.description: No passwords, keys or other sensitive strings are hardcoded — they use variables or are generated
